Oregon Health & Science University | Careers Center | Welcome Skip to Main Content
Please Enable Cookies to Continue
Please enable cookies in your browser to experience all the personalized features of this site, including the ability to apply for a job.
Returning Candidate?
Log back in!

Welcome

Thank you for your interest in OHSU. Here you can view our current job openings and apply for positions online. Or, if you prefer, you can Join our Talent Community to get updates on future opportunities.

 

Returning applicant? Check the status of your application by logging back into your career profile.

 

Previously worked at OHSU? Former employees need to first provide basic information in order to reinstate your previous career profile.

 

OHSU Affiliate Jobs

Our affiliates have great job opportunities too. Learn more

 

Notices to Applicants

Before applying, know your rights under federal and state employment laws, as well as OHSU’s policy on pre-employment drug testing. Learn more

 

Please note: OHSU does not hire individuals who are Tier One or Tier Two members of PERS, or a member of OPSRP, who have officially retired and receive retirement benefits under the state retirement system (PERS, OPSRP)

Job Listings

You can view all open positions or use the following search form to find jobs that suit your specific career interests. Questions? See OHSU Jobs FAQ

The system cannot access your location for 1 of 2 reasons:
  1. Permission to access your location has been denied. Please reload the page and allow the browser to access your location information.
  2. Your location information has yet to be received. Please wait a moment then hit [Search] again.

Oregon Health & Science University

Oregon Health & Science University is dedicated to improving the health and quality of life for all Oregonians through excellence, innovation and leadership in health care, education and research.

© 2001-2019 Oregon Health & Science University. OHSU is an equal opportunity affirmative action institution.
